title: C418 Only
description: A resource pack that removes all music not made by c418
body:
C418 ONLY is a simple resource pack that was made to remove all the new minecraft music not made by C418, and in it's place put other fitting songs from C418s Volume Alpha, and Volume Beta. It also adds much needed variety to certain biomes, and game modes.

In total, 13 new songs are added by this pack all of which are from C418. Their additions purpose is to replace the new music, for example the songs that would place in the swamp biome, and the deep dark were all removed. So these songs fill that void
